local_patches.reason: Replace upstream developer-machine absolute icon path with source-relative icons\rveicon.ico.
Disable the 2.5.0 Beta getrootlength_new() overwrite of rootlength so Total.Root.Length.mm preserves the histogram-derived length used by the official v2.0.2 copper-wire outputs.

Replace whole-root local orientation cv::eigen axis extraction with closed-form 2D PCA angle calculation. This removes OpenCV-version-dependent perpendicular-axis choices and exactly reproduces the Zenodo 8083525 Explorer 2.0.3 whole-root angle columns.
Fix --dranges CLI parsing by appending validated diameter cutoffs to config.dranges. Without this, explicit diameter ranges are consumed but cleared, leaving only one diameter-bin output range.
Set the CLI keepLargest default to false so metadata rows with `Keep largest component, false` are faithfully represented when `-kl` is absent.
Use the official cvutil 2.0.2 bwdist implementation with a C++17 std::thread compatibility fix using std::ref for cv::Mat references.
Use the official cvutil 2.0.2 skeleton implementation; cvutil 2.5.0 skeleton changes caused small but reproducible topology/length differences on the multispecies official tables.
Keep the current cvutil ABI required by rv.exe, but restore the cvutil 2.0.2 one-pixel skeleton boundary when calling the 2.0.2 bwskel helper.

official_reproduction.scope: 28 official copper-wire 600 dpi TIFF images at thresholds 191 and 222
official_reproduction.note: The compatibility build exactly reproduces every compared official column in the local 600 dpi copper-wire validation subset. The 1200 dpi official rows are not checked because the downloaded local image ZIP contains only the 600 dpi TIFF images.

official_multispecies_reproduction.scope: 588 available multispecies root-scan images: 318 herbaceous, 100 maize, 70 trees, and 100 wheat
official_multispecies_reproduction.note: The cvutil official-v202 compatibility DLL is required for exact multispecies reproduction. The upstream cvutil 2.5.0 boundary2 DLL produced 458 nonzero metric rows, mostly topology/skeleton-derived features.

official_whole_root_phenology_validation.scope: Zenodo 8083525 Phenology CrownRoots Explorer 2.0.3 whole-root feature tables for 2023_02_06, 2023_03_13, and 2023_04_24

feature_image_comparison.note: The public processed feature images and local --feature outputs have different PNG file hashes but identical decoded RGBA pixels.

parameter_probe.note: Threshold, keep-largest, background-noise, smoothing, and pruning variants all introduce broad non-orientation differences, so the public metadata workflow is strongly inferred.

official_whole_root_phenology_validation.resolved_cause: The previous residual was caused by OpenCV-version-dependent cv::eigen axis selection in the local whole-root PCA orientation step. Replacing that extraction with a closed-form 2D covariance PCA angle reproduces the Explorer 2.0.3 GUI-era output exactly for the public Zenodo 8083525 CrownRoots tables.
official_whole_root_phenology_validation.note: This is Explorer-origin whole-root exact reproduction evidence for the public Zenodo 8083525 CrownRoots feature tables. The executable still reports 2.5.0 Beta because it is a private CLI compatibility build, not the official GUI binary.
